hero.description: Unify your brokerage operations, automate compliance, and scale effortlessly with our serverless enterprise platform designed for the modern financial ecosystem.

features.sectionDescription: Everything you need to run a modern, compliant, and scalable brokerage in one operating system. Built for speed, security, and scale.

sync.title: Omni-Channel Sync
sync.description: Real-time synchronization across all your trading platforms, CRM, and customer touchpoints. Changes propagate instantly.

ai.title: Talk to Tia AI
ai.description: Your dedicated AI assistant for predictive analytics and automated customer support. Handles 80% of L1 queries.

automation.title: Maker/Checker Automation
automation.description: Secure approval workflows designed for enterprise compliance. Set custom rules for transaction limits and user roles.

scale.title: Serverless Scale
scale.description: Infrastructure that grows with you. Handle millions of transactions without downtime. Zero maintenance overhead for your IT team.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your operations?
cta.description: Join the fastest growing brokerages in the MENA region using Omnigize.
